name: vitals-card
title: Vitals Card
description: Single vital-sign reading with status badge, trend, reference range, and reading time.

props.name: badge
props.description: Overrides the derived status badge entirely.

props.name: trendDirection
props.description: Trend arrow direction is data; direction-goodness is clinical judgment — they are separate props on purpose.

clinicalNotes: `trend` (up/down) and `trendDirection` (good/bad) are deliberately independent: a falling heart rate can be good, a falling SpO₂ is not. The component never infers clinical meaning from numbers — status and direction are always caller-supplied. Always display units and, where possible, the reference range alongside a reading. Status is also exposed as a text label, not color alone.
notes: Ported from petals_ui unchanged apart from import paths.
